hypothesis: If a specialized, tool-augmented multi-agent LLM framework is applied to molecular simulation setup and literature force-field extraction, then it will autonomously produce accurate, complete, and reproducible RASPA inputs and parameters—and successfully execute end-to-end adsorption simulations using the extracted force fields—because agent specialization, ReAct-based tool use, and shared memory enable reliable parsing, parameter mapping, and configuration across increasing task complexity.
